channel.title: Professional-Networking on V31dt | IT Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Professional-Networking on V31dt | IT Portfolio

item.title: Professional Networking Checklist
item.description:
This page tracks the required portfolio items for the Professional Networking module.

Required items

  • Portfolio website available through a public URL
  • About page that clearly identifies who owns the portfolio
  • Blog post explaining how the website was created
  • Four physical event reflections with proof of attendance
  • Hackathon reflection with proof of participation
  • Podcast episode with an external IT expert
  • LinkedIn profile URL, PDF export, and reflection
  • TI on STAGE pitch material and reflection
  • Final PDF version of the website for submission

Current status

Requirement Status Notes
Portfolio website Done Hugo site hosted through GitHub Pages
About page In progress Replace placeholder text with personal details
Website creation post Done Explains Hugo, Archie, GitHub, and the publishing workflow
Event 1 To complete Add event details and proof
Event 2 To complete Add event details and proof
Event 3 To complete Add event details and proof
Event 4 To complete Add event details and proof
Hackathon To complete Add reflection and proof
Podcast To complete Add title, guest, topic, and link
LinkedIn To complete Add profile URL and reflection
TI on STAGE To complete Add pitch material and reflection
